proxy.last_saved_proxy_configuration:
name: coolify-proxy
networks:
  coolify:
    external: true
services:
  traefik:
    container_name: coolify-proxy
    image: 'traefik:v3.6'
    restart: unless-stopped
    extra_hosts:
      - 'host.docker.internal:host-gateway'
    networks:
      - coolify
    ports:
      - '80:80'
      - '443:443'
      - '443:443/udp'
      - '8080:8080'
    healthcheck:
      test: 'wget -qO- http://localhost:80/ping || exit 1'
      interval: 4s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 5
    volumes:
      - '/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro'
      - '/data/coolify/proxy/:/traefik'
    command:
      - '--ping=true'
      - '--ping.entrypoint=http'
      - '--api.dashboard=true'
      - '--entrypoints.http.address=:80'
      - '--entrypoints.https.address=:443'
      - '--entrypoints.http.http.encodequerysemicolons=true'
      - '--entryPoints.http.http2.maxConcurrentStreams=250'
      - '--entrypoints.https.http.encodequerysemicolons=true'
      - '--entryPoints.https.http2.maxConcurrentStreams=250'
      - '--entrypoints.https.http3'
      - '--providers.file.directory=/traefik/dynamic/'
      - '--providers.file.watch=true'
      - '--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.httpchallenge=true'
      - '--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.httpchallenge.entrypoint=http'
      - '--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.storage=/traefik/acme.json'
      - '--api.insecure=false'
      - '--providers.docker=true'
      - '--providers.docker.exposedbydefault=false'
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.traefik.entrypoints=http
      - traefik.http.routers.traefik.service=api@internal
      - traefik.http.services.traefik.loadbalancer.server.port=8080
      - coolify.managed=true
      - coolify.proxy=true

  /artifacts/muh34ukfzblcp0uye19vog3r","type":"stdout","timestamp":"2026-06-26T16:37:39.742673Z","hidden":true,"batch":14,"order":35},{"command":"docker exec muh34ukfzblcp0uye19vog3r bash -c 'cat /artifacts/muh34ukfzblcp0uye19vog3r/.nixpacks/Dockerfile'","output":"FROM ghcr.io/railwayapp/nixpacks:ubuntu-1745885067

ENTRYPOINT ["/bin/bash", "-l", "-c"]
WORKDIR /app/


COPY .nixpacks/nixpkgs-ffeebf0acf3ae8b29f8c7049cd911b9636efd7e7.nix .nixpacks/nixpkgs-ffeebf0acf3ae8b29f8c7049cd911b9636efd7e7.nix
RUN nix-env -if .nixpacks/nixpkgs-ffeebf0acf3ae8b29f8c7049cd911b9636efd7e7.nix && nix-collect-garbage -d
RUN sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl wget

ARG CI COOLIFY_BRANCH COOLIFY_FQDN COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID COOLIFY_URL NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL NIXPACKS_METADATA NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION NODE_ENV NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION PORT
ENV CI=$CI COOLIFY_BRANCH=$COOLIFY_BRANCH COOLIFY_FQDN=$COOLIFY_FQDN COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID=$COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID COOLIFY_URL=$COOLIFY_URL NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=$NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=$NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL NIXPACKS_METADATA=$NIXPACKS_METADATA NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION=$NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION NODE_ENV=$NODE_ENV NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION=$NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION PORT=$PORT

# setup phase
# noop

# install phase
ENV NIXPACKS_PATH=/app/node_modules/.bin:$NIXPACKS_PATH
COPY . /app/.
RUN --mount=type=cache,id=ngls6u6n88p3q8sgs16pw95x-/root/npm,target=/root/.npm npm install

# build phase
COPY . /app/.
RUN --mount=type=cache,id=ngls6u6n88p3q8sgs16pw95x-next/cache,target=/app/.next/cache --mount=type=cache,id=ngls6u6n88p3q8sgs16pw95x-node_modules/cache,target=/app/node_modules/.cache npm run build


RUN printf '\nPATH=/app/node_modules/.bin:$PATH' >> /root/.profile


# start
COPY . /app

CMD ["npm run start"]","type":"stdout","timestamp":"2026-06-26T16:37:40.057273Z","hidden":true,"batch":14,"order":36},{"command":"docker exec muh34ukfzblcp0uye19vog3r bash -c 'cat /artifacts/build.sh'","output":"cd /artifacts/muh34ukfzblcp0uye19vog3r && set -a && source /artifacts/build-time.env && set +a && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --add-host cadvisor:10.0.1.8 --add-host coolify:10.0.1.5 --add-host coolify-db:10.0.1.4 --add-host coolify-realtime:10.0.1.3 --add-host coolify-redis:10.0.1.2 --add-host daksa-coming-soon:10.0.1.11 --add-host grafana:10.0.1.10 --add-host n8n:10.0.1.12 --add-host node-exporter:10.0.1.7 --add-host oiv3p3u27z2ck746h3w4nmge:10.0.1.17 --add-host precya_app:10.0.1.16 --add-host precya_landing:10.0.1.15 --add-host precya_site:10.0.1.13 --add-host prometheus:10.0.1.9 --network host -f /artifacts/muh34ukfzblcp0uye19vog3r/.nixpacks/Dockerfile --progress plain -t ngls6u6n88p3q8sgs16pw95x:4277e651b765d62d9e2edddae0648e9c4261dc3b --build-arg CI --build-arg COOLIFY_BRANCH --build-arg COOLIFY_FQDN --build-arg COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID --build-arg COOLIFY_URL --build-arg NIXPACKS_METADATA --build-arg NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION --build-arg NODE_ENV --build-arg NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV --build-arg PORT --build-arg COOLIFY_BUILD_SECRETS_HASH=78a591c7c0ae454c8459692aaf06e73bc3c132084915470844bd02bf52d5d249 --build-arg 'COOLIFY_URL' --build-arg 'COOLIFY_FQDN' --build-arg 'COOLIFY_BRANCH' --build-arg 'COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID' /artifacts/muh34ukfzblcp0uye19vog3r","type":"stdout","timestamp":"2026-06-26T16:37:40.667792Z","hidden":true,"batch":15,"order":37},{"command":"docker exec muh34ukfzblcp0uye19vog3r bash -c 'bash /artifacts/build.sh'","output":"#0 building with "default" instance using docker driver
